faq.title: Frequently asked questions about pricing
faq.q1: Why a flat fee rather than a commission?
faq.a1: Our flat fee guarantees predictable costs every month, regardless of your employee's salary. Unlike commission-based providers, you do not pay more when you increase your employee's salary or hours. It is fairer and more transparent.
faq.q2: Can I change plan at any time?
faq.a2: Yes, you can switch between plans at any time from your account dashboard. The change takes effect the following month. There are no cancellation fees and no minimum commitment.
faq.a3: Absolutely none. The price displayed is the price you pay. Social contributions and insurance premiums are invoiced separately at cost, with no mark-up on our part.
faq.q4: What does each plan include exactly?
faq.a4: The Basic plan includes full payroll and social contributions management. The Comfort plan adds accident and sickness insurance as well as employment contract generation. The Premium plan additionally includes priority support and employment law advice.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes and let HappySalary handle the administration for you.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Register online in less than 5 minutes.
step1.detail: Enter your details and your employee's information: name, address, AHV number, agreed salary and employment rate. Our form guides you through each step.

step2.title: We take over
step2.description: HappySalary handles all the administrative formalities.
step2.detail: We register your employee with the social insurance scheme, generate the employment contract, calculate statutory deductions and prepare the pay slips automatically each month.

step3.title: Track everything online
step3.description: Access your documents from your account dashboard.
step3.detail: Download pay slips, contracts and annual statements at any time. You receive a notification as soon as a new document is available.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about HappySalary.

general.a1: HappySalary is a Swiss payroll service for household employers. We manage salaries, social contributions, insurance, employment contracts and pay slips — all for a fixed monthly fee.
general.a2: Anyone in Switzerland who employs household staff: cleaning lady, nanny, au pair, elderly care assistant, gardener or any other domestic employee.
general.q3: In which cantons is HappySalary available?
general.a3: HappySalary is available in all Swiss cantons. We apply the specific tariffs and regulations for each canton, particularly with regard to withholding tax.
general.q4: How do I create my account?
general.a4: Visit our website, click on ‘Get Started’ and follow the registration steps. You will need your employee's personal details (name, address, AHV number) and the agreed salary.

pricingFaq.q1: Why a flat fee instead of a commission?
pricingFaq.a1: A flat fee guarantees predictable and fair costs. With a commission model, the better you pay your employee, the more the service costs you. At HappySalary, the price stays the same regardless of the salary amount.
pricingFaq.q2: Are social contributions included in the flat fee?
pricingFaq.a2: The flat fee covers the management and calculation of social contributions. The contributions themselves (AHV/IV/EO/ALV) are invoiced separately at cost, with no mark-up whatsoever on our part.
pricingFaq.a3: No, there is no minimum commitment. You can cancel your subscription at any time. The service ends at the end of the current month.

servicesFaq.q1: What types of employment contracts do you offer?
servicesFaq.a1: We generate employment contracts that comply with the Swiss Code of Obligations and the applicable cantonal standard employment contracts for domestic workers. Each contract is individually tailored to your situation.
servicesFaq.q2: How do the pay slips work?
servicesFaq.a2: Each month, we calculate your employee's net salary after deducting social contributions and, where applicable, withholding tax. The pay slip is available as a PDF in your account dashboard.
servicesFaq.a3: Yes, with the Comfort and Premium plans, we register your employee with the compulsory accident insurance (UVG) and handle all the formalities with the insurer.

legalFaq.q1: Am I required to declare my household employee?
legalFaq.a1: Yes, in Switzerland every employer is legally required to register their household employee with the compensation office (AHV) and to take out accident insurance (UVG). Undeclared work is a criminal offence.
legalFaq.a2: Foreign employees without a C settlement permit are subject to withholding tax. HappySalary automatically calculates the amount based on the tariff of the employee's canton of residence and deducts it from the gross salary.
legalFaq.q3: What are my obligations as an employer?
legalFaq.a3: As a household employer, you must register your employee with social insurance, pay employer contributions, take out accident insurance, draw up an employment contract and issue monthly pay slips. HappySalary takes care of all these obligations on your behalf.

cleaningLady.title: Employing a Cleaning Lady
cleaningLady.subtitle: Register your cleaner simply and in full compliance with the law.
cleaningLady.description: Whether your cleaning lady works just a few hours per week or part-time, HappySalary handles all the administrative formalities: AHV contributions, accident insurance, employment contract and pay slips.

b1.description: We handle all registrations with the compensation office, even for just a few hours per week.

b2.description: An employment contract compliant with the cantonal standard contract for domestic workers, adapted to your situation.

b3.title: Insurance sorted
b3.description: Compulsory accident insurance included, protecting both your employee and yourself.

b4.title: Predictable costs
b4.description: A flat fee from CHF 9.90/month, regardless of the salary paid.

b3.title: Comprehensive insurance

marie.name: Marie L.
marie.text: HappySalary has taken a huge weight off my shoulders. I was paying a 5% commission on my cleaner's salary with another provider. Now I pay a flat fee and everything is included. Simple and transparent.

thomas.name: Thomas M.
thomas.text: We have a full-time nanny and the paperwork was a nightmare. With HappySalary, the contract, pay slips and contributions are all managed automatically. I highly recommend it.

anna.name: Anna S.
anna.text: I hosted an au pair and had no idea where to start with the formalities. HappySalary handled the withholding tax, insurance and contract. A real relief.

peter.name: Peter W.
peter.text: My mother needs a home carer and we wanted to do everything by the book. HappySalary allowed us to register the employee quickly and without stress. The flat fee is unbeatable.

sophie.name: Sophie B.
sophie.text: My gardener only comes 4 hours a month, but I still had to register him. HappySalary makes it straightforward and the cost is negligible compared to a fine for undeclared work.

marco.name: Marco R.
marco.text: The customer support is excellent. I had a question about EO contributions and received a clear, detailed answer within an hour. I am a Premium customer and I have no regrets.

footer.description: HappySalary simplifies payroll management for household employers in Switzerland. Social contributions, insurance and contracts, all managed for a fixed fee.
